parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets clock and reset logic threshold

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic rising-edge four-state quadrature and sampled baseband state.
Use bounded smoothed voltage contributions only.
Do not use transistor-level devices, S-parameters, AC/noise analysis, communication decoding, or validation side channels.

properties.observable_contract: Active-high reset returns I/Q baseband outputs, LO monitors, and mixer monitors to 0.45 V and phase_mon to 0.9 V.
Successive non-reset rising clk edges cycle the I/Q coefficient pairs through (1,0), (0,1), (-1,0), and (0,-1), then wrap.
Lo_i and lo_q equal 0.45 V plus 0.40 V times their current quadrature coefficients.
Each mixer monitor equals 0.45 V plus 1.25 times the vin deviation times its LO coefficient, clamped to 0.02 V through 0.88 V.
On each valid edge, out and metric apply the public 0.85 first-order update toward mix_i and mix_q respectively and remain clamped to 0.02 V through 0.88 V.
Phase_mon exposes the current four-state phase as phase/3 times 0.9 V.

title: IQ Downconversion Chain
